body: "Rural flood resilience partnership is a work plan that will:   help rural communities to strengthen the resilience of their homes and businesses provide evidenced solutions to the challenges rural communities face in the event of flooding influence decision making provide access to resources support action on the ground strengthen rural resilience to flooding in a changing climate   Member organisations of this partnership are:   Environment Agency National Farmers Union (NFU) Action with Communities in Rural England (ACRE) Association of Drainage Authorities (ADA) Country Land and Business Association (CLA) Natural England  "
